title: WolfMod
description: A mod I made about wolves.
body:
A mod that adds a custom dimension called "The Wolf Dimension."

Additions

• Wolf Diamonds (Wolf Diamond, Wolf Diamond Ore, Wolf Diamond Block, etc.)

• Wolf Dimension 

• Wolf Wood

Credits

TheCyberCat

NOTICE

This project is in beta. More is soon to come. Please expect bugs and glitches.
